prompt: Create a flashy Japanese YouTube thumbnail in a dark futuristic cyber-tech style, 16:9 landscape composition, with a deep navy-to-black background filled with glowing blue circuit-board patterns, connected network nodes, tiny digital squares, and electric energy lines. At the top center, place a small white Japanese headline reading センスに頼らないAI時代の新常識. In the center, add a massive 2-line Japanese title in metallic silver-white beveled lettering with intense neon-blue outer glow, electric lightning cracking behind and through the letters, reading AIツール 完全攻略. Beneath the main title, place one black horizontal banner with thin gold trim and white serif Japanese text reading Claude Code 解説LIVE 本日21:00〜. On the right side, include 1 cute chibi sheep mascot standing on a glowing blue circular platform, with fluffy light blue and lavender fur, small horns, simple dot eyes, a neutral expression, outlined in purple-blue light, holding a short stick, and surrounded by a red-orange flame aura behind its body. Along the bottom, place 3 glowing futuristic rounded rectangular panels with blue neon borders and dark interiors, evenly spaced left to right. The left panel contains 1 white head-with-circuit icon and the Japanese text AI生成から次へ進化. The center panel contains 1 white upward-trend chart icon and the text "AIでブランディング". The right panel contains 1 white group-and-gear icon and the text "人もAIも動かす戦略". Use extremely high contrast, glossy metallic text effects, layered blue rim lighting, energetic lightning, subtle lens glows, and a premium high-impact webinar thumbnail aesthetic.
